description_long: This object is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a large, wedge-shaped metal blade. The blade is broad and thick, with a single sharp edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for chopping or splitting wood. The handle appears to be made from a dark, natural wood, showing a subtle grain and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The blade is metallic gray, with a matte finish and no visible decorative elements or engravings. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the top of the handle. There are no visible brand markings, labels, or embellishments on either the blade or the handle.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a thick, single-edged metal blade, designed for chopping tasks. The blade is matte gray and securely mounted to the handle, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the side, showing the full profile of the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped blade.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top, highlighting the narrow edge of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile of the axe, again showing the curved handle and the full width of the blade.
description_view_3: The axe is viewed from the bottom, displaying the thickness of the blade and the end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural grain, ergonomic shape, and rounded cross-section for comfortable grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the top of the handle.
